sagemaker.workteam.memberdefinition.CfnA: Defines an Amazon Cognito or your own OIDC IdP user group that is part of a work team.

sagemaker.workteam.memberdefinition.Cogn.Description: The Amazon Cognito user group that is part of the work team.

sagemaker.workteam.memberdefinition.Oidc.Description: A list user groups that exist in your OIDC Identity Provider (IdP). One to ten groups can be used to create a single private work team. When you add a user group to the list of `Groups`, you can add that user group to one or more private work teams. If you add a user group to a private work team, all workers in that user group are added to the work team.
